short_text: Mark Adair to Odean Smith, no run, Was a full and wide ball outside off, and well outside the tramline too, however, the
full_text: Mark Adair to Odean Smith, no run, Was a full and wide ball outside off, and well outside the tramline too, however, the umpire hasn't signalled a wide because he thinks Odean Smith had moved a bit too across. Ireland have done well to restrict the West Indies below the 150-run mark

short_text: Mark Adair to Odean Smith, , throws the kitchen sink at it, slices it over deep backward point as this finds the boundar
full_text: Mark Adair to Odean Smith, , throws the kitchen sink at it, slices it over deep backward point as this finds the boundary once again.

short_text: Mark Adair to Odean Smith, 2 runs, drives this low full toss to sweeper cover, calls for two and manages to storm back f
full_text: Mark Adair to Odean Smith, 2 runs, drives this low full toss to sweeper cover, calls for two and manages to storm back for the second run. The throw from the fielder was a flat one and the keeper was quick as well, but Smith was even quicker

short_text: Mark Adair to Odean Smith, , slower one attempted, but well outside off, wide called
full_text: Mark Adair to Odean Smith, , slower one attempted, but well outside off, wide called

full_text: Mark Adair to Odean Smith, no run, wide yorker attempted, Odean Smith can't get underneath

full_text: Mark Adair to Odean Smith, , Picks the bones out of this freebie and launches it over deep mid-wicket for a 106 metre six. Much needed for West Indies, but Mark Adair will be livid with himself

short_text: Mark Adair to Brandon King, 1 run, low full toss on middle and leg, King tries to flick that away, gets hit on the pads
full_text: Mark Adair to Brandon King, 1 run, low full toss on middle and leg, King tries to flick that away, gets hit on the pads though. The ball drops in front of the bowler as they take a single

full_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, , attempts a slower one, but misses the tramline outside off

full_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, no run, banged into the pitch short, Brandon King swings and misses, beaten due to the quick pace and extra bounce this time around. Contrasting to the previous ball

short_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, no run, slower one outside off, Brandon King swings and misses, beaten due to the lack of pace
full_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, no run, slower one outside off, Brandon King swings and misses, beaten due to the lack of pace and bounce

short_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, , right into the slot, a length delivery and Brandon King has clubbed it over deep mid-wicket
full_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, , right into the slot, a length delivery and Brandon King has clubbed it over deep mid-wicket for another massive six. 93 metre maximum as West Indies are getting crucial runs towards the end

short_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, no run, right into the blockhole around off, Brandon King is early in his swing, beaten an end
full_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, no run, right into the blockhole around off, Brandon King is early in his swing, beaten an ends up

short_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, 2 runs, short and wide outside off, Brandon King slaps this to sweeper cover where it has been
full_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, 2 runs, short and wide outside off, Brandon King slaps this to sweeper cover where it has been stopped with a dive in the deep

short_text: Joshua Little to Odean Smith, , wow! Short ball outside off and Odean Smith has thumped it over deep extra cover for a c
full_text: Joshua Little to Odean Smith, , wow! Short ball outside off and Odean Smith has thumped it over deep extra cover for a clean six. Way back into the stands as Joshua Little finishes his spell conceding a six on the final ball. Odean Smith has been struggling to connect 'em, but this six will give him a lot of confidence

full_text: Joshua Little to Brandon King, 1 run, whipped to long-on as the bowler goes full

full_text: Delany to Odean Smith, no run, googly around middle and off, Odean Smith drives it back to the Delany. Such a pivotal spell this can prove to be. - simply outstanding, those are also his

full_text: Delany to Odean Smith, no run, flighted delivery on off, Odean Smith drives this to cover

full_text: Delany to Odean Smith, no run, looks to flick this through the leg-side, gets an inside edge to mid-wicket. Odean Smith had left his crease, but had to put a dive in order to get back in

short_text: Delany to Powell, Caught by Tector!! Delany continues to shine. West Indies and their woes against spin - a never ending
full_text: Delany to Powell, Caught by Tector!! Delany continues to shine. West Indies and their woes against spin - a never ending saga! This is the third wicket for Delany as Powell tries to take him on with this slogsweep, but holes out to deep mid-wicket. Would have cleared other grounds in the world, but not in Australia. King is going strong from one end, but isn't getting much support from the other end.

short_text: Delany to Powell, no run, flighted delivery outside off, way too full, Powell swings and misses
full_text: Delany to Powell, no run, flighted delivery outside off, way too full, Powell swings and misses

short_text: Delany to Brandon King, 1 run, Shimmies down the wicket and smacks this floated delivery to long-on to bring up the mile
full_text: Delany to Brandon King, 1 run, Shimmies down the wicket and smacks this floated delivery to long-on to bring up the milestone. His team mates in the dug-out give him a standing ovation and so do the West Indian fans in the stands

short_text: Mark Adair to Powell, no run, dot ball to end the over as Mark Adair nails his yorker outside off, Powell fails to conne
full_text: Mark Adair to Powell, no run, dot ball to end the over as Mark Adair nails his yorker outside off, Powell fails to connect his drive once again. Looks like Ireland have gone for caught behind review, and there's a - so that's nothing more than a review wasted

full_text: Mark Adair to Powell, , slower one outside off, another wide ball

full_text: Mark Adair to Powell, no run, well executed yorker outside off, Powell fails to squeez it out

full_text: Mark Adair to Brandon King, no run, pitched up by Mark Adair outside off, this one shapes away from him as Brandon King gets beaten on his flashy drive

full_text: Mark Adair to Brandon King, , short and wide outside off, way too wide though

full_text: Mark Adair to Powell, 1 run, back of a length around middle and leg, Powell pulls this to wide long-on for a single

full_text: Mark Adair to Brandon King, 1 run, on a length outside off, punched through cover for a single

full_text: Delany to Powell, , A loose delivery down the leg-side and Powell goes down on his knee to sweep it away to the fine leg boundary. Delany won't be happy with that, had bowled such a good over till the last ball

full_text: Delany to Powell, no run, nicely tossed up delivery on off, pushed to cover with soft hands

full_text: Delany to Brandon King, 1 run, transfers his weight on to the back foot, heaves this shortish delivery through mid-wicket for one

full_text: Delany to Brandon King, no run,  way too full on middle and off, Brandon King squeezes it back to Delany

full_text: Delany to Powell, 1 run, as Powell bunts this shortish delivery to long-on for one

short_text: Delany to Pooran, Caught by Tector!! West Indies captain departs! Delany does the trick once again. A tossed up delivery
full_text: Delany to Pooran, Caught by Tector!! West Indies captain departs! Delany does the trick once again. A tossed up delivery by the spinner, keeps it outside off, well out of the batter's reach. Pooran tries to slice it over deep point with a lofted shot, but fails to clear the fielder stationed near the boundary. That was the longer boundary and Delany made it count.

short_text: Joshua Little to Brandon King, no run, pulls this towards the fielder at mid-wicket as the bowler goes short
full_text: Joshua Little to Brandon King, no run, pulls this towards the fielder at mid-wicket as the bowler goes short

full_text: Joshua Little to Pooran, 1 run, touch fuller on off, Pooran drives it to mid-off for a single

full_text: Joshua Little to Pooran, no run, short ball outside off, well directed bouncer that Pooran leaves alone

short_text: Joshua Little to Pooran, , A massive six by Pooran as the bowler goes short and he nails the pull over deep mid-wicket.
full_text: Joshua Little to Pooran, , A massive six by Pooran as the bowler goes short and he nails the pull over deep mid-wicket. Such a powerful strike that and the Ireland captain - Balbirnie looks a concerned man. We all know what Pooran is capable of, once he gets his eye in

short_text: Joshua Little to Brandon King, 1 run, short and quick on off, Brandon King attempts a pull, gets a top edge that drops i
full_text: Joshua Little to Brandon King, 1 run, short and quick on off, Brandon King attempts a pull, gets a top edge that drops in front of third man

full_text: Joshua Little to Pooran, 1 run, lovely stop by Campher at deep backward square leg as he sprints to his left, stretches and stops the ball with a dive. Was a short ball by Joshua Little and the batter pulled it uppishly, on a bounce in front of the fielder, keeps them down to a single

full_text: Simi Singh to Pooran, 1 run, slaps this short and wide ball through point for one

short_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, , King is playing a lovely innings. This was pitched up by McCarthy and Brandon King plays a c
full_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, , King is playing a lovely innings. This was pitched up by McCarthy and Brandon King plays a clean lofted shot over the bowler's head. The fielder in the deep tried to stop it with a sprint, but the timing was good enough to beat him

full_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, , short and slow on middle and leg, Brandon King gets into position early and whips this through mid-wicket as he manages to bisect the fielders converging near the boundary

short_text: Delany to Lewis, Caught by Mark Adair!! Lewis' rusty knock comes to an end. A googly by Delany around off and Lewis trie
full_text: Delany to Lewis, Caught by Mark Adair!! Lewis' rusty knock comes to an end. A googly by Delany around off and Lewis tries to take him on. Swings hard against the wrong 'un and miscues it to deep mid-off. Adair charges in from the deep and completes a pretty good catch. Ireland have done well to keep the run rate in check with these regular strikes.

full_text: Delany to Lewis, , way too wide outside off, Lewis attempts a flashy drive, gets beaten though

full_text: Joshua Little to Lewis, 2 runs, hooked through backward square leg as the bowler goes short on middle and leg, good running between the wickets. Joshua Little isn't happy with the fielding effort though

full_text: Campher to Brandon King, 2 runs, times his square cut pretty well, but the fielder stationed in the deep does well to grab and get rid of the ball. An impressive tag-team effort in the deep as it's a relayed throw, but they can't stop the batters from taking a brace

short_text: Campher to Brandon King, , Campher continues to leak runs. Short of a length delivery outside off and Brandon King has p
full_text: Campher to Brandon King, , Campher continues to leak runs. Short of a length delivery outside off and Brandon King has punched this past the man at cover with impeccable timing and placement. Conceded 16 runs in his first over, has conceded 10 runs in this one

full_text: Campher to Lewis, 1 run, banged in short by Campher and Lewis rocks back to pull this through mid-wicket for one

full_text: Campher to Brandon King, , Campher isn't having a great day so far. A short and wide ball outside off and Brandon King throws the kitchen sink at it, whacks it through cover-point for a rollicking boundary

full_text: McCarthy to Lewis, 1 run, carves this back of a length delivery through point for one

full_text: McCarthy to Brandon King, 1 run, driven to mid-off for a quick single by Brandon King

full_text: McCarthy to Lewis, 1 run, drives this overpitched delivery to wide mid-off where the fielder is quick to move across and collect the ball

full_text: Simi Singh to Brandon King, no run, This was chipped back at the bowler and Simi Singh dives to his left and almost plucks a one-handed blinder. Brilliant effort, but Brandon King gets another life

short_text: Simi Singh to Brandon King, no run, quicker through the air on off, Brandon King defends it watchfully
full_text: Simi Singh to Brandon King, no run, quicker through the air on off, Brandon King defends it watchfully

short_text: Simi Singh to Brandon King, , Brandon King off with a first-ball boundary. Pitched up by Simi Singh outside off and Bran
full_text: Simi Singh to Brandon King, , Brandon King off with a first-ball boundary. Pitched up by Simi Singh outside off and Brandon King times his off-drive and manages to beat the fielder at wide mid-off

short_text: Simi Singh to Charles, Caught by Campher!! Simi Singh strikes in his first over. Charles was starting to take-off, but t
full_text: Simi Singh to Charles, Caught by Campher!! Simi Singh strikes in his first over. Charles was starting to take-off, but the off-spinner brings an end to his charge. A short ball outside off, on the shorter side and Charles cuts it straight to the fielder stationed at backward point. Campher - who conceded 16 runs in the previous over, is the man stationed there and he makes sure to latch on to it, some sort of a revenge for him as he's involved in Charles' dismissal.

short_text: Simi Singh to Charles, no run, fraction short and wide outside off, Charles punches it powerfully to cover-point, can't
full_text: Simi Singh to Charles, no run, fraction short and wide outside off, Charles punches it powerfully to cover-point, can't get it past the fielder stationed inside the ring

short_text: Campher to Charles, 1 run, nudged off an inside edge towards mid-wicket as the bowler goes full. - gives away more runs
full_text: Campher to Charles, 1 run, nudged off an inside edge towards mid-wicket as the bowler goes full. - gives away more runs than the first 3 overs did

short_text: Campher to Charles, ,A slower one by Campher, an off-cutter, Charles picks the bones out of it, and launches it over lon
full_text: Campher to Charles, ,A slower one by Campher, an off-cutter, Charles picks the bones out of it, and launches it over long-on with a mighty swing of his blade

short_text: Campher to Charles, , back-to-back boundaries. Short and wide outside off, and Charles has smashed this through point wi
full_text: Campher to Charles, , back-to-back boundaries. Short and wide outside off, and Charles has smashed this through point with a powerful cut shot. No chance to stop that and Charles will derive a lot of confidence with these successive boundaries

short_text: Campher to Charles, , Latches on to this short ball and thumps it with a flat bat over mid-off. Plenty of power behind t
full_text: Campher to Charles, , Latches on to this short ball and thumps it with a flat bat over mid-off. Plenty of power behind that blow as Charles adds four more to his tally

full_text: Campher to Charles, no run, back of a length around middle and leg, worked to mid-wicket with a closed bat face

full_text: Campher to Lewis, 1 run, on the batter's pads as Lewis nudges it through square leg for a single

full_text: McCarthy to Lewis, 1 run, if Mark Adair bowled a good over, McCarthy bowls a better one. Was banged in short by McCarthy and Lewis pulled it to the left of deep square leg for a single to end the over

full_text: McCarthy to Lewis, no run, on a length around middle and off, Lewis knocks it back to McCarthy

short_text: McCarthy to Mayers, Caught by Tector!! McCarthy draws first blood. The pressure of dot balls does the trick. Hits the de
full_text: McCarthy to Mayers, Caught by Tector!! McCarthy draws first blood. The pressure of dot balls does the trick. Hits the deck hard on a good length and Mayers looks to play a lofted shot. Mistimes it completely as the ball lobs to mid-off and Tector stationed there completes the formalities. Not the kind of start West Indies would have wanted, electing to bat first. The lanky Ireland pacers have gotten their team off to an impressive start.

short_text: McCarthy to Charles, 1 run, good length delivery on middle and leg, Charles nudges this to wide mid-on for a quick singl
full_text: McCarthy to Charles, 1 run, good length delivery on middle and leg, Charles nudges this to wide mid-on for a quick single

short_text: McCarthy to Charles, no run, right into the blockhole at 137 clicks, Charles brings his bat down quickly and digs it bac
full_text: McCarthy to Charles, no run, right into the blockhole at 137 clicks, Charles brings his bat down quickly and digs it back to the bowler

short_text: McCarthy to Charles, no run, full and wide outside off, Charles stands tall and bludgeons this along the turf to wide mi
full_text: McCarthy to Charles, no run, full and wide outside off, Charles stands tall and bludgeons this along the turf to wide mid-off

short_text: Mark Adair to Mayers, no run, short of a length outside off, touch slow as Mayers opens the bat face, steering this to s
full_text: Mark Adair to Mayers, no run, short of a length outside off, touch slow as Mayers opens the bat face, steering this to short third man.

short_text: Mark Adair to Mayers, no run, good length delivery on middle and leg, Mayers clips it to square leg and calls for a sing
full_text: Mark Adair to Mayers, no run, good length delivery on middle and leg, Mayers clips it to square leg and calls for a single, but his partner sends him back. Had to put in a dive to get back in as the fielder was quick to get rid of the ball at the keeper's end

short_text: Mark Adair to Charles, 1 run, banged in short by Mark Adair and Charles pulls it off his back foot, on a bounce to the f
full_text: Mark Adair to Charles, 1 run, banged in short by Mark Adair and Charles pulls it off his back foot, on a bounce to the fielder stationed at deep square leg

short_text: Mark Adair to Charles, no run, shorter one around middle and leg, Charles heaves it off his back foot to mid-on
full_text: Mark Adair to Charles, no run, shorter one around middle and leg, Charles heaves it off his back foot to mid-on

short_text: Mark Adair to Charles, no run, pitched up by Mark Adair around the off-stump line, Charles stands tall and guides this b
full_text: Mark Adair to Charles, no run, pitched up by Mark Adair around the off-stump line, Charles stands tall and guides this back to the bowler with a straight bat face

short_text: Mark Adair to Charles, 2 runs, a loose start by Mark Adair. Short and wide outside off, plenty of width on offer. Charle
full_text: Mark Adair to Charles, 2 runs, a loose start by Mark Adair. Short and wide outside off, plenty of width on offer. Charles slaps this through cover as the fielder sprints back and stops it with a slide in the deep, keeps them down to a brace

short_text: Joshua Little to Mayers, no run, seaming away from the batter outside off, touch short as Mayers opens the bat account,
full_text: Joshua Little to Mayers, no run, seaming away from the batter outside off, touch short as Mayers opens the bat account, steering this to short third man

short_text: Joshua Little to Charles, 1 run, short of a length outside off, Charles steers this through point for a single
full_text: Joshua Little to Charles, 1 run, short of a length outside off, Charles steers this through point for a single

short_text: Joshua Little to Charles, , that's the first boundary of the match. Full and quick outside off, hint of width and Charle
full_text: Joshua Little to Charles, , that's the first boundary of the match. Full and quick outside off, hint of width and Charles swings at this away from his body. A thick outside edge is induced as it flies over backward point and is away to the fence where there wasn't a fielder placed in the deep

short_text: Joshua Little to Charles, no run, nice carry there. Short and quick outside off, Charles gets surprised due to the bounc
full_text: Joshua Little to Charles, no run, nice carry there. Short and quick outside off, Charles gets surprised due to the bounce as he plays inside the line eventually

short_text: Joshua Little to Charles, no run, better delivery by Joshua Little. Pitched up by the lanky pacer, just outside off, Cha
full_text: Joshua Little to Charles, no run, better delivery by Joshua Little. Pitched up by the lanky pacer, just outside off, Charles goes for a drive and gets beaten on the outside edge

short_text: Joshua Little to Mayers, 1 run, short and quick on off, Mayers taps it into the off-side, right next to the pitch and op
full_text: Joshua Little to Mayers, 1 run, short and quick on off, Mayers taps it into the off-side, right next to the pitch and opens his account with a first-ball single

short_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, , Tucker comes down the track, converts it into a half-volley and carves this full delivery over t
full_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, , Tucker comes down the track, converts it into a half-volley and carves this full delivery over the covers.

short_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, 1 run, square-driven to deep point off the front foot. Scores level
full_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, 1 run, square-driven to deep point off the front foot. Scores level

short_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, no run, full delivery, dinked to backward point with an opened bat-face
full_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, no run, full delivery, dinked to backward point with an opened bat-face

short_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, short delivery, Stirling goes hard on the pull, hits him high on the bat and falls well short
full_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, short delivery, Stirling goes hard on the pull, hits him high on the bat and falls well short of deep mid-wicket

short_text: Holder to Stirling, no run, off-speed, full and wide of off, Stirling throws his bat for a drive and is beaten on the ou
full_text: Holder to Stirling, no run, off-speed, full and wide of off, Stirling throws his bat for a drive and is beaten on the outside edge

full_text: Holder to Stirling, no run, very full, blunted to mid-wicket

full_text: Holder to Tucker, 1 run, skips down the track and dabs this short ball down to third man

full_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, pace off, on a length and wide of off, Stirling waits for it on the back foot and runs it down to third man

short_text: Holder to Tucker, 1 run, slower ball, full and wide of off, drive hard to deep cover
full_text: Holder to Tucker, 1 run, slower ball, full and wide of off, drive hard to deep cover

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, Joseph slips in a yorker outside off, Stirling can't jam it out

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Tucker, 1 run, full on leg, Tucker is early to flick and the ball lobs up in the air. Falls short of t
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Tucker, 1 run, full on leg, Tucker is early to flick and the ball lobs up in the air. Falls short of the forward-running deep mid-wicket fielder

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Tucker, no run, pitched up outside off, driven firmly but straight to mid-off
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Tucker, no run, pitched up outside off, driven firmly but straight to mid-off

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, 1 run, shuffles and flicks through mid-wicket
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, 1 run, shuffles and flicks through mid-wicket

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, 2 runs, Overpitched, Stirling waits and hammers it. The ball bursts through the hands of Kin
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, 2 runs, Overpitched, Stirling waits and hammers it. The ball bursts through the hands of King at extra cover

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , Ireland are now just toying with the Windies. Stirling walks across a long way, fetches th
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , Ireland are now just toying with the Windies. Stirling walks across a long way, fetches this length ball from outside off and scoops it over short fine leg. Good contact

short_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, no run, 110kph, pace off and shorter, Tucker looks to slap it away and under-edges towards cover
full_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, no run, 110kph, pace off and shorter, Tucker looks to slap it away and under-edges towards cover

short_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, , 133kph, that's an authoritative stroke! Tucker gives the charge to the bowler b coming down the
full_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, , 133kph, that's an authoritative stroke! Tucker gives the charge to the bowler b coming down the track. Moves leg-side in the process and hoists it handsomely over long-on for a 90m six

short_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, 1 run, 139kph, stays back and taps this length ball in front of point, quick single taken
full_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, 1 run, 139kph, stays back and taps this length ball in front of point, quick single taken

short_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, 1 run, 115kph, slow ball on a shortish length, pulled to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, 1 run, 115kph, slow ball on a shortish length, pulled to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, no run, pace off again, Tucker turns it to mid-wicket
full_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, no run, pace off again, Tucker turns it to mid-wicket

short_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, no run, off-speed shortish ball outside off, Tucker chops and gets an under-edge that rolls to the
full_text: Obed McCoy to Tucker, no run, off-speed shortish ball outside off, Tucker chops and gets an under-edge that rolls to the keeper

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, 1 run, short and flat, cut away to sweeper cover

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, 2 runs, 91kph, walks across to jab this shorter ball through mid-wicket and gets an inside edge
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, 2 runs, 91kph, walks across to jab this shorter ball through mid-wicket and gets an inside edge that eludes the sticks and the keeper.

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, , meaty hit! Down on one leg is Tucker as he nails the slog-sweep for a 79m six. It eas full and
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, , meaty hit! Down on one leg is Tucker as he nails the slog-sweep for a 79m six. It eas full and drifted in, Tucker latched onto it

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, no run, shapes up to reverse-sweep and gets a top-edge that falls well short of short third man
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, no run, shapes up to reverse-sweep and gets a top-edge that falls well short of short third man

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, no run, slower and shorter, Tucker shuffles and misses the flick to get beaten on the outside edge

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 1 run, punched to long-off

full_text: Holder to Tucker, no run, low full toss, driven straight to mid-off

full_text: Holder to Tucker, no run, 128kph, full and angled in, clipped straight to mid-wicket

full_text: Holder to Tucker, 2 runs, 127kph, short ball, Tucker stands tall to pull it in front of square on the on-side

short_text: Holder to Tucker, 2 runs, 129kph, Tucker comes down the track, moves leg-side in the process to open up the off-side. Co
full_text: Holder to Tucker, 2 runs, 129kph, Tucker comes down the track, moves leg-side in the process to open up the off-side. Converts it into a low full toss and drives through the covers

short_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, back of a length, tucked around the corner
full_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, back of a length, tucked around the corner

full_text: Holder to Stirling, no run, 119kph, slow and overpitched outside off, Stirling gets forward and drives straight to cover

full_text: Odean Smith to Tucker, no run, 132kph, back of a length delivery, Tucker stands tall in his defence

full_text: Odean Smith to Stirling, 1 run, length ball outside off, tapped on its head to send it to third man

short_text: Odean Smith to Tucker, 1 run, slow, low full toss, Tucker gets down to swipe and miscues to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Odean Smith to Tucker, 1 run, slow, low full toss, Tucker gets down to swipe and miscues to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Odean Smith to Tucker, , , dug in short and that hurries onto the batter. Tucker is late on the pull and the ball balloo
full_text: Odean Smith to Tucker, , , dug in short and that hurries onto the batter. Tucker is late on the pull and the ball balloons up off the top-edge. Smith calls for it and catches. Oh wait, Tucker has been asked to wait. Smith has overstepped - nothing behind the line. Oh dear!

short_text: Odean Smith to Stirling, 1 run, pitched up outside off, drilled to sweeper cover
full_text: Odean Smith to Stirling, 1 run, pitched up outside off, drilled to sweeper cover

short_text: Odean Smith to Stirling, , Superb knock in a pressure game. Pacy length ball, Stirling deliberately opens his bat-face a
full_text: Odean Smith to Stirling, , Superb knock in a pressure game. Pacy length ball, Stirling deliberately opens his bat-face and guides it very fine to place it fine of third man. Raise of the bat from the veteran!

short_text: Odean Smith to Tucker, 1 run, , Tucker leans forward and opens his bat-face to ease this fullish delivery behind square
full_text: Odean Smith to Tucker, 1 run, , Tucker leans forward and opens his bat-face to ease this fullish delivery behind square on the off-side

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, fuller than good length, pushed defensively to cover
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, fuller than good length, pushed defensively to cover

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Tucker, 3 runs, Tucker is through with his drive early and gets enough wood to chip it over mid-on. Ho
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Tucker, 3 runs, Tucker is through with his drive early and gets enough wood to chip it over mid-on. Holder runs back and stops it with his boot to save a run.

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, 1 run, pitched up, driven hard to mid-off for a single thanks to a misfield
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, 1 run, pitched up, driven hard to mid-off for a single thanks to a misfield

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , Short ball that sits up nicely for the batsman. Stirling waits for it on the back foot and
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , Short ball that sits up nicely for the batsman. Stirling waits for it on the back foot and pummels it over deep square leg for an 88m six. Caught by a lad on the grassbanks

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, in-slanting back of a length ball, Stirling defends from the crease
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, in-slanting back of a length ball, Stirling defends from the crease

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Tucker, 1 run, 136kph, back of a length slanted in, tucked to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, 1 run, 90kph, quicker one, worked through mid-wicket. Another six-run over

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 1 run, 92kph, short of length, Stirling stays back and works it through square leg

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, 1 run, 85kph, slower through the air, chopped to cover point for another quick single

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 1 run, nudged into the mid-wicket pocket for a single
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 1 run, nudged into the mid-wicket pocket for a single

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, 1 run, 90kph, moves leg-side and leans across to elevate this fullish ball over extra cover, did
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, 1 run, 90kph, moves leg-side and leans across to elevate this fullish ball over extra cover, didn't quite middle it

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 1 run, 89kph, short of length marginally outside off, punched through point
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 1 run, 89kph, short of length marginally outside off, punched through point

short_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, off-pace, Stirling waits for the ball and turns it to backward square leg. Six runs off the o
full_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, off-pace, Stirling waits for the ball and turns it to backward square leg. Six runs off the over - that's enough for Ireland...

short_text: Holder to Tucker, 1 run, 125kph, off-speed short ball, pulled to deep square leg
full_text: Holder to Tucker, 1 run, 125kph, off-speed short ball, pulled to deep square leg

short_text: Holder to Tucker, 2 runs, 128kph, full and angled in, worked away to deep mid-wicket for a couple more
full_text: Holder to Tucker, 2 runs, 128kph, full and angled in, worked away to deep mid-wicket for a couple more

short_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, 128kph very full and on the pads, helped on its way to long leg
full_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, 128kph very full and on the pads, helped on its way to long leg

short_text: Holder to Tucker, 1 run, 136kph, dug in short, Tucker swivels and pulls through backward square leg
full_text: Holder to Tucker, 1 run, 136kph, dug in short, Tucker swivels and pulls through backward square leg

short_text: Holder to Tucker, no run, Tucker walks down to a short ball, hops and fends it towards backward point
full_text: Holder to Tucker, no run, Tucker walks down to a short ball, hops and fends it towards backward point

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, 1 run, very full delivery, bunted towards mid-wicket
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, 1 run, very full delivery, bunted towards mid-wicket

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, , wow! A superb shot to get off the mark. That made a cracking sound. Gets down on one leg and s
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, , wow! A superb shot to get off the mark. That made a cracking sound. Gets down on one leg and sweeps fiercely through square leg. No chance for the man in the deep to cut it off

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, no run, 87kph, bit of flight on this occasion, Tucker presses forward to push it into the off-si
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Tucker, no run, 87kph, bit of flight on this occasion, Tucker presses forward to push it into the off-side. Gets an inside edge that dies down on the pitch

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Balbirnie, Caught by Mayers!! Gone! 92kph, Balbirnie sees the width and goes hard on the cut. Doesn't bo
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Balbirnie, Caught by Mayers!! Gone! 92kph, Balbirnie sees the width and goes hard on the cut. Doesn't bother to keep it down and pays the price. Mayers dives to his right at backward point to snaffle it with both hands. West Indies badly needed that wicket. A good knock from the Ireland captain comes to an end as he falls to an innocuous delivery.

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Balbirnie, no run, 90kph, hint of away-spin, pushed to backward point off the outer half
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Balbirnie, no run, 90kph, hint of away-spin, pushed to backward point off the outer half

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 1 run, 92kph, flat ball from a short of length, punched to sweeper cover

full_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, 123kph, slow and short, swivel-pulled to deep square leg. Another good over for Ireland

full_text: Holder to Balbirnie, 1 run, off-speed ball from a short of length, tucked through mid-wicket

full_text: Holder to Balbirnie, no run, yorker length, jammed to mid-off

full_text: Holder to Balbirnie, , poor line from Holder. Overpitched and on the pads at 130kph, Balbirnie flicks and gets some wood on it as the ball runs away very fine to fine leg for four

full_text: Holder to Stirling, 1 run, 99kph, slower ball wide of off, Stirling waits and cuts to deep point

full_text: Holder to Balbirnie, 1 run, 127kph, short of length ball, punched to long-on

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Balbirnie, 1 run, length ball outside off, driven on the rise to point who fails to collect it cleanly. End of a

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, 1 run, in-slanting short of length ball, turned to square leg for a quick single

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, , back of a length, defended into the off-side

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , 139kph, width served, Stirling stands tall and slaps the cut through backward point. Reach
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , 139kph, width served, Stirling stands tall and slaps the cut through backward point. Reaches the fence in a jiffy

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , short and wide of off, a hopping Stirling flashes his bat at it and gets a fat top-edge th
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , short and wide of off, a hopping Stirling flashes his bat at it and gets a fat top-edge that flies over the vacant slip cordon goes very fine. Akeal Hosein runs across to his left and tries to flick it back into play, a good effort but in vain

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, full delivery, driven back to the bowler, Joseph stops in his followthrough
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, full delivery, driven back to the bowler, Joseph stops in his followthrough

short_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, no run, 111kph, slower ball to end the over, Balbirnie tries to dab it behind square and only m
full_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, no run, 111kph, slower ball to end the over, Balbirnie tries to dab it behind square and only manages an under-edge that's been cut off by the keeper

short_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, no run, pitched up, driven straight to mid-off
full_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, no run, pitched up, driven straight to mid-off

short_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, 2 runs, back of a length, Balbirnie stays leg-side of the ball, hops and opens his bat-face to
full_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, 2 runs, back of a length, Balbirnie stays leg-side of the ball, hops and opens his bat-face to guide it to the right of short third man

short_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, no run, , pushed to cover
full_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, no run, , pushed to cover

short_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, , that's an incredible shot from the skipper! 138kph, full and wide of off, Balbirnie reaches o
full_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, , that's an incredible shot from the skipper! 138kph, full and wide of off, Balbirnie reaches out for this delivery by bending his back leg and carves it over cover point. Goes all the way and the six brings up the

short_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, 1 run, 109kph, off-speed full delivery outside off, Stirling throws his arms at it and slices ov
full_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, 1 run, 109kph, off-speed full delivery outside off, Stirling throws his arms at it and slices over point

short_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, no run, , pushes this length ball back at the bowler. Three dots to end the over, but still 14
full_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, no run, , pushes this length ball back at the bowler. Three dots to end the over, but still 14 off it

short_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, no run, , low full toss, driven past the bowler and Balbirnie eyes a single, gets sent back by
full_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, no run, , low full toss, driven past the bowler and Balbirnie eyes a single, gets sent back by Stirling

short_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, no run, back of a length, Balbirnie stands tall to tap it to cover
full_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, no run, back of a length, Balbirnie stands tall to tap it to cover

short_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, , four more! Odean Smith persists with the short stuff. Serves width outside off on this occas
full_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, , four more! Odean Smith persists with the short stuff. Serves width outside off on this occasion and Balbirnie slashes it wide of short third man

short_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, , , in-slanting shortish delivery, Balbirnie gets inside the line and pulls it over fine leg.
full_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, , , in-slanting shortish delivery, Balbirnie gets inside the line and pulls it over fine leg. Looked like a top-edge but the ball had enough wings to go over McCoy at fine leg

short_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, , Balbirnie greets Smith with a boundary! It was a hit-me ball from the bowler. In-angler, ful
full_text: Odean Smith to Balbirnie, , Balbirnie greets Smith with a boundary! It was a hit-me ball from the bowler. In-angler, fullish on the pads, easy pickings for the batter. Balbirnie uses the bowler's pace and angle to whip it over backward square leg for a one-bounce four

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, 2 runs, 140kph, full delivery angled in, flicked off the inner half to deep mid-wicket. 10 r
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, 2 runs, 140kph, full delivery angled in, flicked off the inner half to deep mid-wicket. 10 runs off the over - another good one for West Indies...

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , swung away over deep mid-wicket! Off-pace, fullish ball at 123kph, Stirling spots it, wait
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , swung away over deep mid-wicket! Off-pace, fullish ball at 123kph, Stirling spots it, waits for it and clobbers it into the stands

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, , pitched up, driven hard by Stirling but Joseph half-stops it with his left hand in
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, , pitched up, driven hard by Stirling but Joseph half-stops it with his left hand in his followthrough

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , , very full but Joseph spills it down leg, Stirling misses the flick
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, , , very full but Joseph spills it down leg, Stirling misses the flick

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, , Stirling shuffles across to whip one over the leg-side and misses the in-angler. O
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, , Stirling shuffles across to whip one over the leg-side and misses the in-angler. Ouch. Stirling grimaces in pain and the physio is out...

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, , short of length, middle-stump line, hurries onto the batter and Stirling blocks it
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Stirling, no run, , short of length, middle-stump line, hurries onto the batter and Stirling blocks it out

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Balbirnie, 1 run, 136kph, in-slanting back of a length ball, tucked to deep mid-wicket
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Balbirnie, 1 run, 136kph, in-slanting back of a length ball, tucked to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, , 96kph, four more! Stirling walks across, gets low and fiercely sweeps over and square of sho
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, , 96kph, four more! Stirling walks across, gets low and fiercely sweeps over and square of short fine leg. One bounce and into the fence. Ireland off to a superb start and West Indies will be under the pump

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Balbirnie, 1 run, knocked towards mid-on for a quick single
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Balbirnie, 1 run, knocked towards mid-on for a quick single

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Balbirnie, , 96kph, fullish in-drifter, Balbirnie gets down on one leg, fetches it from outside off and
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Balbirnie, , 96kph, fullish in-drifter, Balbirnie gets down on one leg, fetches it from outside off and plays a fantastic sweep shot. Incredible timing and the ball flies over deep backward square leg for a maximum. He didn't over-hit!

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 1 run, 90kph, in-dart, full in length, driven down to long-on
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 1 run, 90kph, in-dart, full in length, driven down to long-on

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 2 runs, 89kph, makes room to slam this short of length ball over mid-off. Miscued and the ball
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 2 runs, 89kph, makes room to slam this short of length ball over mid-off. Miscued and the ball plugs after clearing the fielder inside the ring

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 2 runs, 89kph, shouts of 'catch it' but the ball goes over McCoy. In-drifter, Stirling gets do
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Stirling, 2 runs, 89kph, shouts of 'catch it' but the ball goes over McCoy. In-drifter, Stirling gets down to sweep and top-edges over short fine leg

short_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, no run, 127kph, nips in from a short of length and cramps the batter for room. Balbirnie misses
full_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, no run, 127kph, nips in from a short of length and cramps the batter for room. Balbirnie misses the glance and gets hit on the thigh

short_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, no run, 131kph, back of a length ball, Balbirnie stays leg-side of the ball to tap it to cover
full_text: Obed McCoy to Balbirnie, no run, 131kph, back of a length ball, Balbirnie stays leg-side of the ball to tap it to cover

short_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, 1 run, chases this wider ball and toe-ends it to deep backward point
full_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, 1 run, chases this wider ball and toe-ends it to deep backward point

short_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, , Stirling and Ireland get off the mark. Shortish away-slanter, Stirling chases with a slash and
full_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, , Stirling and Ireland get off the mark. Shortish away-slanter, Stirling chases with a slash and gets a top-edge that flies over the slip fielder. Smith runs across from third man and dives to his left but to no avail

short_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, no run, Stirling dances down the track giving the charge to the bowler and aims to pummel it ove
full_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, no run, Stirling dances down the track giving the charge to the bowler and aims to pummel it over mid-wicket. Connects with thin air as this back of a length ball bounces over the blade

short_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, no run, away-slanter from over the wicket. Stirling drives with no feet movement and gets beaten
full_text: Obed McCoy to Stirling, no run, away-slanter from over the wicket. Stirling drives with no feet movement and gets beaten on the outside edge
